ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new confirmed cases */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of new recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "serious_critical" INTEGER /* Number of serious or critical cases */,
  "cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of cases per million population */,
  "deaths_per_million" REAL /* Number of deaths per million population */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "tests_per_million" REAL /* Number of tests per million population */,
  "cases_per_person" INTEGER /* Number of cases per person */,
  "deaths_per_person" INTEGER /* Number of deaths per person */,
  "tests_per_person" INTEGER /* Number of tests per person */,
  "new_cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of new cases per million population */,
  "new_deaths_per_million" REAL /* Number of new deaths per million population */,
  "active_cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of active cases per million population */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data entry */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new confirmed cases */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of new recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "serious_critical" INTEGER /* Number of serious or critical cases */,
  "cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of cases per million population */,
  "deaths_per_million" REAL /* Number of deaths per million population */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "tests_per_million" REAL /* Number of tests per million population */,
  "cases_per_person" INTEGER /* Number of cases per person */,
  "deaths_per_person" INTEGER /* Number of deaths per person */,
  "tests_per_person" INTEGER /* Number of tests per person */,
  "new_cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of new cases per million population */,
  "new_deaths_per_million" REAL /* Number of new deaths per million population */,
  "active_cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of active cases per million population */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the alert is for */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry being validated */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if validation failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
